# Plan

## Goal
Fix the known typo in README.md so the project title reads correctly.

## Implementation Steps
1. Open README.md in the repository root.
2. Replace the single misspelled token with its corrected form.
3. Save the file. No other files are touched.

## Files to Change
- `README.md` — correct the one-word typo in the title

## Validation
After the edit, re-read README.md and confirm the title contains the intended spelling.

## Risks
- If the typo appears in multiple places, only the title is in scope. All other occurrences are left alone.
